interface.longDescription:
Looking for something to do? StubHub makes it easy to explore live events right inside ChatGPT. With over 50 million listings across 200+ countries, you can discover concerts, sports, theater, comedy, festivals, and more — all in one place.

Features
•Search by performer, category, or location
•Browse and filter ticket listings
•See the view from your seat
defaultPrompt: When are the Backstreet Boys playing in Vegas
